Our mission is to provide expert guidance and support to ensure all students, regardless of their needs, receive an equitable and inclusive education. evidence_title: Special Education – East Central Ohio ESC
evidence_snippet: Skip to main content Driver’s Education Event Registration Programs & Services Public Services Background Checks Driver Education Print Services District Services Alternative Education Business Advisory Council Communication Services Curriculum Services Fiscal Services Gifted Services Occupational Therapy Online Learning Paraprofessional Testing Preschool Services Preservice School Bus Technology Services Special Education Student Programs World Languages Programs Career Navigation Help Me Grow Employment FAQ Directions to ECOESC Districts Served Fees for Service Licensure Public Notices School Bus FAQ What is an ESC Make a Payment Staff Employee Intranet SCVIEW Technology Information Title IX Compliance Home / Special Education Special Education The East Central Ohio ESC provides a comprehensive range of special education services and supports to member districts across the region. Our team of licensed specialists works alongside district staff to ensure students with disabilities receive high-quality, legally compliant services tailored to their individual needs — from evaluation and therapy to transition planning and administrator support. Available Services Speech-Language Pathology Evaluation and therapy services for students with communication disorders, including speech, language, fluency, and voice. Learn more → Occupational Therapy School-based OT services to help students develop the fine motor, sensory, and functional skills needed to participate fully in their educational program. Learn more → Physical Therapy PT services focused on improving gross motor skills,
